title: Incorrectly Implemented Trie Node Creation Due to Missing Child Node Copy

statement.markdown: Given a Trie data structure, implement a method to insert a word into the Trie. However, the `TrieNode` creation is incorrect, leading to incorrect child node references.
statement.inputFormat: A string array representing the words to insert into the Trie
statement.notes: Time and space complexity should be O(n), where n is the total number of characters in all words.

examples.output: The modified Trie would have the word "apple" as the root, followed by "app", and then "application"

hints.text: First hint text: Check the `TrieNode` creation for correct child node references.

functionSignature.python: def insert(self, root, words: list[str]) -> None;

testCases.input: First line count, second line elements (stdin match)
